mandatory_claims: UniT establishes a unified physical language for human-to-humanoid transfer
UniT achieves state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution generalization
UniT enables zero-shot task transfer and direct human-to-humanoid action transfer
required_visuals: t-SNE visualization of human and humanoid features
Comparison of UniT with alternative methods
likely_failures: Overemphasis on technical details without clear explanations
Lack of concrete examples and applications
Insufficient discussion of limitations and potential falsifiers
preventive_checks: Verify that technical terms are explained in plain English
Ensure that each section has a clear applied takeaway
Check that alternative methods are discussed and compared
backup_remedies: Add more diagrams and illustrations to explain complex concepts
Provide additional examples and case studies to demonstrate applications
Include more discussion of potential limitations and falsifiers
reviewer_focus: Effectiveness of visual aids and diagrams
Thoroughness of discussion of limitations and potential falsifiers
